description_long: This object is a break-action shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a compact, dark wooden pistol grip. The barrel is smooth and metallic, extending in a straight line from the action to the muzzle, with no visible ribbing or venting. The action is clearly break-open, as seen from the hinge and the way the barrel is separated from the grip in one view. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a simple, functional design. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of polished wood, contrasting with the dark metal of the barrel and action. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality.
description: A break-action shotgun with a long, smooth metal barrel and a dark wooden pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The shotgun is shown from an angled side view, highlighting the break-action mechanism and the separation between the barrel and grip.
description_view_1: A clear side profile reveals the full length of the smooth barrel and the compact wooden grip.
description_view_2: This rear-angled view emphasizes the ergonomic shape of the wooden grip and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_3: The top-down view displays the straight alignment of the barrel and the curvature of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, unreinforced design
